DP.179.0000:
Cynthia: Have you been keeping well?\f
Thank you for Mt. Coronet.
I’m truly grateful.\f
Together, you and your Pokémon
overcame all the challenges you\r
faced, however difficult.\f
It means that you’ve triumphed
over any personal weaknesses, too.\f
The power you learned...
I can feel it emanating from you.\f
But that’s enough talk.
Let’s get on with why you’re here.\f
As the Pokémon League Champion,
I accept your challenge!\f
DP.179.0001:
Cynthia: That was excellent.
Truly, an outstanding battle.\f
You gave the support your Pokémon
needed to maximize their power.\f
And you guided them with certainty
to secure victory.\f
You have both passion and
calculating coolness.\f
Together, you and your Pokémon 
can overcome any challenge\r
that may come your way.\f
Those are the impressions I got
from our battle.\f
I’m glad I got to take part in the
crowning of Sinnoh’s new Champion!\f
DP.179.0002:
Come with me.
We’ll take the lift.\f
DP.179.0009:
Cynthia: One look at you tells
me many things about you.\f
Together, you and your Pokémon
overcame all the challenges you\r
faced, however difficult.\f
It means that you’ve triumphed over
any personal weaknesses, too.\f
The power you learned...
I can feel it from you.\f
That’s enough talking.
Let’s get on with why you’re here.\f
I, Cynthia, accept your challenge as
the Pokémon League Champion!\f
There won’t be any letup from me!\f
